metadata.title: Parkinson's disease and pregnancy: An updated review.
metadata.text: Pregnancy does not often occur in the setting of Parkinson's disease (PD) as the most common age of onset is beyond the childbearing years, yet management of these two conditions is crucial for the health of both mother and child.
